destinations.name: Switzerland
destinations.description: A symphony of snow-capped peaks, crystalline lakes and alpine meadows. Switzerland is where legendary luxury meets raw natural power. From the clockwork precision of its cities to the timeless silence of the Matterhorn, it is a destination that defines the pinnacle of travel.

landmarks.title: The Matterhorn
landmarks.description: The world's most iconic peak, a jagged pyramid of rock and ice that commands the Zermatt skyline. A symbol of Swiss majesty.

landmarks.title: Lake Lucerne
landmarks.description: A breathtaking fjord-like lake surrounded by historic villages and soaring mountains. The birthplace of Swiss independence.

landmarks.title: Jungfraujoch
landmarks.description: The 'Top of Europe' — a high-alpine wonderland of ice and snow accessible by a historic cogwheel railway.

destinations.bestSeasonsMonths: June to September and December to March

seasonsHighlights.description: Lush green valleys alpine wildflowers and mirror-clear lakes perfect for hiking and lake cruises.
A world-class ski paradise with cozy chalets fondues by the fire and sparkling snow-covered peaks.

destinations.name: Bali Indonesia
destinations.description: A paradise island where ancient Hindu temples rise from volcanic jungles and terraced rice fields cascade into the ocean. Bali is not just a destination — it is a spiritual experience that permanently changes the way you see beauty, stillness and ceremony.
destinations.essenceText: Where spirit nature and beauty are one.

landmarks.title: Tanah Lot Temple
landmarks.description: An ancient sea temple perched on a dramatic offshore rock silhouetted against the fiery Balinese sunset — one of the most photographed sights in all of Asia.

landmarks.title: Ubud Rice Terraces
landmarks.description: Emerald green terraced rice paddies carved into volcanic hillsides over centuries — a UNESCO-listed masterpiece of agricultural engineering and natural beauty.

landmarks.title: Mount Agung
landmarks.description: Bali's sacred and highest peak considered the navel of the world by the Balinese — visible from nearly everywhere on the island it commands both awe and reverence.

seasonsHighlights.description: Post-monsoon freshness with luminous green landscapes minimal crowds and every waterfall at full dramatic flow.
The perfect Balinese month — golden light all day calm seas ideal for diving and temple festivals filling the air with incense and offering.

destinations.name: Santorini, Greece
destinations.description: A volcanic island sculpted by ancient eruptions into one of the most iconic seascapes on earth. The caldera's geometry — stark white against infinite Aegean blue — offers a visual silence that no photograph can fully capture. Santorini is not merely visited; it is absorbed.
destinations.essenceText: Where volcanic drama meets Aegean infinity.

landmarks.title: Oia Clifftop
landmarks.description: The world-famous blue-domed village perched on the northern caldera edge — best experienced at dawn before the crowds arrive.

landmarks.title: Akrotiri Ruins
landmarks.description: A Minoan Bronze Age settlement preserved beneath volcanic ash — often called the 'Pompeii of the Aegean' for its extraordinary state of preservation.

landmarks.title: Red Beach
landmarks.description: Dramatic blood-red volcanic cliffs tower over a secluded pebble shore — accessible only by boat or a steep coastal path reserved for the persistent.

seasonsHighlights.description: Warm Aegean temperatures, minimal crowds, vibrant wildflowers blooming across the caldera rim — the island at its most authentic.
Golden afternoon light, cooler evenings ideal for cliff-side dining, and the sea still warm from three months of summer sun.

destinations.name: Kyoto, Japan
destinations.description: Ancient temples, traditional gardens, and the essence of Japanese culture. Every corner reveals a new perspective, inviting the ethereal voyager to pause and witness poetic landscapes frozen in time.

seasonsHighlights.description: Kyoto is blanketed in pale pink blossoms, creating an ethereal and fleeting landscape.
Vibrant red and gold maple leaves frame the ancient temple architecture perfectly.

destinations.name: Amalfi Coast
destinations.description: Dramatic cliffs, colorful villages, and Mediterranean charm. The vertical alignment of the towns offers an unparalleled vantage over the azure waters.

landmarks.title: Positano Heights
landmarks.description: Cascading pastel villas clinging to rugged cliffs.

landmarks.title: Ravello Gardens
landmarks.description: Spectacular cliffside views of the Tyrrhenian Sea.

landmarks.title: Amalfi Duomo
landmarks.description: Majestic Byzantine architecture in the town square.

seasonsHighlights.description: Warm sun, vibrant boat rides to Capri, and bustling limoncello cafes.
The perfect balance of cooling sea breezes and calm romantic terraces.

destinations.name: Swiss Alps
destinations.description: Crystalline peaks, absolute silence, and untouched snowscapes. Experience the pinnacle of European alpine luxury.

landmarks.title: The Matterhorn
landmarks.description: The world's most iconic alpine spire.

landmarks.title: Lake Geneva
landmarks.description: Pristine waters reflecting the snow-capped summits.

landmarks.title: Zermatt Valley
landmarks.description: Car-free sanctuary hidden deep in the mountains.

seasonsHighlights.description: Powder skiing, fondue by giant hearths, and silent glacial treks.
Wildflower pastures and crystal clear high-altitude lakes.

tours.name: Swiss Alpine Elegance
tours.overviewDescription: A 6-day journey through the heart of the Swiss Alps, from the medieval streets of Lucerne to the car-free mountain air of Zermatt.
tours.overviewExtended: Experience Switzerland exactly as it should be seen: via the world's most scenic trains, in historic lakeside hotels and at the foot of the mighty Matterhorn. We combine private boat cruises with gourmet alpine dining and exclusive mountain access.
tours.transport: Swiss Travel Pass & First Class Rail

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Zurich and Lucerne
itinerary.description: Private transfer from Zurich to Lucerne. Afternoon walking tour of the Chapel Bridge and Old Town followed by a sunset cruise on Lake Lucerne.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Mount Pilatus Golden Roundtrip
itinerary.description: A historic cogwheel railway journey to the summit of Mt. Pilatus for 360 degree views of the Alps followed by a descent via cable car.
itinerary.schedule: 09:00 Cogwheel ascent - 12:00 Summit Lunch - 15:00 Cable car descent

itinerary.title: Day 3: Scenic Rail to Interlaken
itinerary.description: Travel first-class on the Luzern-Interlaken Express through the Brunig Pass. Afternoon at leisure in the adventure capital of Interlaken.
itinerary.schedule: 10:00 Scenic Train - 13:00 Interlaken arrival - 15:00 Optional Paragliding

itinerary.title: Day 4: Jungfraujoch - Top of Europe
itinerary.description: Ascend to the highest railway station in Europe. Walk through the Ice Palace and step out onto the Sphinx Terrace for views of the Aletsch Glacier.
itinerary.schedule: 08:30 Train to Jungfrau - 11:00 Ice Palace - 14:00 Descent

itinerary.title: Day 5: Zermatt and The Matterhorn
itinerary.description: Travel to the car-free village of Zermatt. Afternoon Gornergrat mountain railway journey for the best views of the Matterhorn.
itinerary.schedule: 09:00 Train to Zermatt - 14:00 Gornergrat Railway - 17:00 Village Walk

itinerary.title: Day 6: Final Alpine Morning and Departure
itinerary.description: One last sunrise over the Matterhorn. Leisurely breakfast and boutique shopping in Zermatt before your first-class rail transfer back to Zurich.

sightseeing.title: Lake Lucerne Cruise
sightseeing.description: A private boat cruise across the emerald waters of Switzerland's most historic lake with views of Bürgenstock.

sightseeing.title: Mount Pilatus Summit
sightseeing.description: Experience the steepest cogwheel railway in the world and stand above the clouds at 2132 meters.

sightseeing.title: Ice Palace Jungfraujoch
sightseeing.description: Walk through tunnels of ice carved deep within the Jungfrau glacier 3454 meters above sea level.

sightseeing.title: Zermatt Old Village
sightseeing.description: Explore 500-year-old traditional Swiss barns and narrow sun-blackened wooden streets in this car-free paradise.

testimonials.quote: The First Class rail journeys were the highlight for me. Passing through the Brunig Pass with those massive windows was like watching a movie of the most beautiful place on earth.
testimonials.author: SARAH W. - New York

testimonials.quote: Waking up in Zermatt to the sun hitting the peak of the Matterhorn was a spiritual experience. Every hotel was a masterpiece of Swiss hospitality.
testimonials.author: MICHAEL K. - Berlin

tours.name: Bali Spirit Journey
tours.overviewDescription: Seven days through Bali's temples, rice terraces and sacred coastlines — a journey designed for travellers who seek depth over distance.
tours.overviewExtended: We move through Bali slowly and intentionally. Sunrise ceremonies at Besakih, private cooking classes with a Ubud family, evening kecak fire dances and a final dawn ascent of Mount Batur that ends with breakfast above the clouds. Every detail is arranged so you arrive fully present.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrive Seminyak and Welcome
itinerary.description: Private airport transfer to a clifftop villa overlooking the Indian Ocean. Evening purification ceremony with a local Balinese priest at sunset.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Sacred Temple Circuit
itinerary.description: Private guided tour of Tanah Lot at sunrise before the crowds followed by Pura Taman Ayun and a traditional Balinese lunch in Mengwi.
itinerary.schedule: 05:30 Tanah Lot sunrise - 10:00 Taman Ayun - 13:00 Lunch

itinerary.title: Day 3: Ubud Rice Terraces and Art Village
itinerary.description: Full day in Ubud — walk the Campuhan Ridge at dawn, visit the Tegalalang rice terraces and attend a private Kecak dance performance in the evening.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Cooking Class and Healer Visit
itinerary.description: Morning spice market walk with your host family, hands-on Balinese cooking class then a private session with a traditional Balinese healer (Balian).
itinerary.schedule: 08:00 Market walk - 10:00 Cooking class - 15:00 Healer session

itinerary.title: Day 5: Amed and Underwater World
itinerary.description: Drive to Amed on Bali's east coast for sunrise snorkelling over a Japanese WWII shipwreck and vibrant coral gardens teeming with tropical fish.
itinerary.meals: Breakfast - Seafood lunch on the beach

itinerary.title: Day 6: Mount Batur Summit and Hot Springs
itinerary.description: Pre-dawn guided trek to the summit of Mount Batur (active volcano) for a sunrise above the clouds. Descend to natural volcanic hot springs for recovery.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Farewell and Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning of traditional Balinese spa ritual at your villa — a full-body boreh scrub and flower bath before private transfer to the airport.

sightseeing.title: Tanah Lot Sunrise
sightseeing.description: Private pre-dawn access to Bali's most iconic sea temple before it opens to the public — the sky turns gold as the tide retreats.

sightseeing.title: Tegalalang Rice Terraces
sightseeing.description: Walk through centuries-old terraced paddy fields with a local farmer explaining the subak irrigation system recognised by UNESCO.

sightseeing.title: Mount Batur Sunrise Trek
sightseeing.description: A guided pre-dawn ascent of Bali's sacred volcano culminating in a 360 degree sunrise panorama above the clouds — a defining life experience.

sightseeing.title: Kecak Fire Dance
sightseeing.description: An evening open-air performance of the ancient Ramayana epic performed by a chorus of 50 men by torchlight at Uluwatu cliff temple.

testimonials.quote: The Mount Batur sunrise was the single most beautiful thing I have ever witnessed. Standing above the clouds on an active volcano as the sun rises over Lombok — I was completely speechless.
testimonials.author: PRIYA R. - Mumbai

testimonials.quote: Seven days felt like seven weeks in the best possible way. The healer session on Day 4 was unexpectedly profound. Our guide Wayan is extraordinary — deeply knowledgeable and completely warm.
testimonials.author: THOMAS H. - London

tours.name: Golden Triangle Odyssey
tours.overviewDescription: Explore Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur in a mesmerizing journey.
tours.overviewExtended: A comprehensive journey through India's rich history, diving deep into majestic forts, romantic palaces, and bustling bazaars.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrive Delhi
itinerary.description: Arrival, check-in and welcome dinner experience.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Taj Mahal at Sunrise
itinerary.description: A magical morning viewing the Taj Mahal in Agra.

sightseeing.title: Taj Mahal
sightseeing.description: A marble mausoleum and world wonder

testimonials.quote: An unforgettable experience from start to finish!
testimonials.author: John Doe

testimonials.quote: The guides were highly knowledgeable and helpful.
testimonials.author: Jane Smith

tours.name: Greek Islands: The Curator's Path
tours.overviewDescription: A nine-day private archipelago journey across Santorini, Mykonos, and Milos — curated for guests who demand visual impact without compromise.
tours.overviewExtended: Sail between islands on a private catamaran. Sleep in caldera-edge suites carved into volcanic rock. Dine at tables that hang over the Aegean. Every transfer, every reservation, every moment of silence is orchestrated in advance. This is Greece without the noise.

itinerary.title: Day 1–2: Athens Arrival & Acropolis Private Access
itinerary.description: VIP transfer to a boutique hotel in Plaka. Private after-hours access to the Acropolis with a personal archaeologist — the site illuminated only by moonlight.
itinerary.schedule: 14:00 Airport transfer · 17:00 Hotel check-in · 21:00 Acropolis private access

itinerary.title: Day 3–5: Santorini Caldera Suite
itinerary.description: Helicopter transfer to Santorini. Three nights in a cave suite on the caldera rim. Private sunset sailing, Akrotiri archaeological preview, and a volcanic hot-spring circuit.
itinerary.schedule: 09:00 Helicopter depart · 10:30 Arrive Santorini · 18:00 Sunset sail

itinerary.title: Day 6–7: Milos & Secret Beaches
itinerary.description: Catamaran crossing to Milos — the island of a thousand beaches. Full-day exploration of Sarakiniko lunar landscape and Kleftiko sea caves by private speedboat.
itinerary.schedule: 08:00 Depart by catamaran · 11:00 Arrive Milos · 14:00 Kleftiko caves speedboat

itinerary.title: Day 8–9: Mykonos & Departure
itinerary.description: Optional final night in a private villa in Little Venice, Mykonos. Concludes with private transfer to Athens for international departure.
itinerary.schedule: Morning leisure · 15:00 Ferry to Mykonos · Day 9: 12:00 Athens flight transfer

sightseeing.title: Caldera Sunset Sail
sightseeing.description: Private catamaran circumnavigation of the Santorini caldera timed exactly for golden-hour descent.

sightseeing.title: Akrotiri Archaeological Tour
sightseeing.description: Private guided tour of the Minoan ruins with an expert archaeologist before the site opens to the public.

sightseeing.title: Milos Kleftiko Sea Caves
sightseeing.description: Exploration of the legendary pirate caves accessible only by sea — dramatic white limestone arches rising from turquoise water.

testimonials.quote: The Akrotiri private access alone was worth the entire trip. Standing inside a 3,500-year-old city in complete silence — that does not happen anywhere else in the world.
testimonials.author: P. ANDREOU

testimonials.quote: We have sailed the Mediterranean before, but never like this. The catamaran, the caves, the caldera suite — everything was flawless and completely invisible in its execution.
testimonials.author: L. FONTAINE

tours.name: The High Sierras Elevation
tours.overviewDescription: A rugged yet refined expedition through the vertical landscapes of the American West.
tours.overviewExtended: Stay in architectural lodges that disappear into the rock faces and trek under the purest night skies. This journey marries intense physical exploration with world-class backcountry luxury.

itinerary.title: Ascent to the Lodge
itinerary.description: Helicopter transfer from the valley floor directly to our luxury basecamp.

itinerary.title: Glacier Traverse
itinerary.description: A guided trek across timeless ice formations, ending with a specialized hot-tent dinner.

sightseeing.title: Yosemite Aerial
sightseeing.description: A breathtaking helicopter tour over Half Dome.

testimonials.quote: We felt completely disconnected from civilization but entirely swathed in high luxury.
testimonials.author: M. HARRISON

tours.name: Mediterranean Elegance
tours.overviewDescription: Experience the coastal beauty of the Amalfi Coast combined with exclusive access to private villas and Michelin-starred dining.
tours.overviewExtended: Sail the azure waters on a private yacht, skipping the crowded streets to dock directly at secluded cliffside restaurants. This is the Mediterranean experienced exactly how it was meant to be.

itinerary.title: Capri by Sea
itinerary.description: Sail around the dramatic limestone stacks and anchor for a sunset culinary tasting.

itinerary.title: Positano Heights
itinerary.description: Private car service up the winding cliffs to a secluded villa dinner.

sightseeing.title: Blue Grotto Private
sightseeing.description: Early entry to the legendary cavern.

sightseeing.title: Lemon Grove Tour
sightseeing.description: Exclusive access to historic Sorrento lemon groves with a master distiller.

testimonials.quote: Breathtaking from the moment we stepped onto the yacht.
testimonials.author: D. LORENZO
